name: FACIS Meter
info:
FACIS Simulation — Energy meter (Janitza UMG 96RM-shaped readings).
Mirrors src/simulators/energy_meter/{simulator,load_curves}.py.
Cumulative energy uses the deterministic year-anchored integration
from `_calculate_cumulative_energy`. Physics duplicated in
tests/flows/smart-energy.spec.js — keep in sync.

name: energy-meter-simulator compute
